description_long: This object consists of a set of four wooden beds, two of which are bunk beds stacked vertically, and two are single beds placed side by side. Each bed features a sturdy, dark brown wooden frame with visible wood grain texture, and both headboards and footboards are present on all beds. The beds are topped with thin, rectangular mattresses covered by red blankets and light gray sheets, giving a uniform and utilitarian appearance. Two wooden storage chests with metal latches are positioned near the beds, suggesting a dormitory or barracks setting. The construction appears robust, with thick posts and slats supporting the mattresses. The overall design is functional and simple, suitable for communal sleeping arrangements in urban environments such as hostels, shelters, or dormitories.
description: A set of four wooden beds, including two bunk beds and two single beds, each with red blankets and sturdy frames, accompanied by two wooden storage chests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked bunk beds on the right and single beds on the left, with all headboards and footboards visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the beds and the placement of the storage chests at the foot of the single beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the beds and the tops of the storage chests, with the bunk bed structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the footboards of all beds and the arrangement of the beds in two rows.
